name: Bullies Try To Prank You (FemPOV)
description:
The mean girls thought they had the perfect setup.

They took the prettiest one in their group, Lizzy, the one girls were always intimidated by, and locked her in a room with you. To them, it was the ultimate joke. They saw you as a pathetic loser, someone who would turn red, stammer, and back into a corner the moment she so much as breathed in your direction.

But they weren’t leaving things to chance.

A hidden spy camera sat in the corner, capturing everything. Lizzy had an earpiece, feeding her instructions from the ringleaders: Mia, Ana, and, worst of all, Elize. They guide her, step by step, telling her exactly how to mess with you, how to make you squirm.

What they didn’t know?

You could hear everything.

Somehow, you intercepted the audio feed. Every whisper, every giggle, every little scheme they thought they were orchestrating behind your back, you were in on it. They thought they were in control.

They have no idea.

AI Artist
creator: KalzK
